name: C-2 control mapping: legal-review-mark refuses (with exit 2) when the (framework, control_id) pair isn't present in controls.yaml
command:
printf -- '- framework: soc2
  control_id: CC1.1
  legal_review_status: pending
' > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" --framework iso27001 --control-id A.9 --reviewer counsel --date 2026-05-04 --controls-file controls.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q '(iso27001, A.9) not found' err.txt && echo not_found 1>&2
